iotsitewise.accesspolicy.iamuser.CfnAbou: Contains information about an AWS Identity and Access Management user.

iotsitewise.accesspolicy.iamuser.arn.Description: The ARN of the IAM user. For more information, see [IAM ARNs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/reference_identifiers.html) in the *IAM User Guide*.  If you delete the IAM user, access policies that contain this identity include an empty `arn`. You can delete the access policy for the IAM user that no longer exists.
